title: Run inspection UX paper cuts
body: A collection of UX issues when inspecting runs and node executions: (1) run duration not shown on a single run; (2) node execution duration missing when selecting a node; (3) payload inspection is hard — JSON collapsed by default, no full-screen/modal view for large payloads; (4) no way to return to live canvas when the sidebar is collapsed; (5) cannot search runs by title in the runs sidebar.
